    @pytest.mark.error
    def test_missing_version_field(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        tmp_path: Path,
        store_server,
    ) -> None:
        """Missing version field is rejected."""
        store_server.queue_primary_payload(
            "cfg/name",
            {"found": True, "value": "store-name"},
        )
        schema_path = _write_schema(

                }
            },

            entrypoint_argv,

        )
